label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 1

extraction.one_line_summary: MILESI Lorenzo (DSM) took red by 0.5s over Movistar as darkness and standing water destroyed favorites' TTT ambitions.
tactical_patterns: DSM exploited early-start timing advantage: heat-evaporated tarmac gave dry lines before rain intensified for later favorites.
UAE Emirates abandoned ALMEIDA Joao after bike change rather than waiting, revealing fragile team cohesion under pressure.
Jumbo-Visma waited for crashed teammates losing 32s, opposite tactic to UAE showing contrasting GC-protection philosophies.
Movistar separated final 150m losing victory by 0.5s, suggesting inadequate rehearsal of finish protocol.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: UAE abandoned him post-crash/bike-change, signals he's not their protected GC rider
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: livid about darkness/conditions suggests mental fragility when circumstances beyond control
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Jumbo 32s down after waiting for crashed riders shows team vulnerability in technical TTT conditions
rider_signals.MILESI Lorenzo: positive: DSM gave him red jersey over Ganna, reveals unexpected team hierarchy decision
